title: Add a missing id attribute to a <.live_component> invocation
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/live/settings_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.SettingsLive) that calls <.live_component module={MyAppWeb.PreferencesComponent} id="preferences" user={@user} /> in its render body. mount/3 returns {:ok, assign(socket, :user, %{id: 1, name: "Ada"})}. Every live_component invocation MUST have a unique id attribute. Use ~H.
tier_rationale: LiveComponents require unique id. Single-rule fix.
